name: Planetary Surface Analysis Workshop 2026
description: An intensive three-day workshop focused on cutting-edge techniques for planetary surface characterization, including ML-based anomaly detection, spectral analysis pipelines, and remote sensing data fusion. Participants work with real orbital datasets and present original analyses. Past attendees have gone on to publish in Icarus and PSJ.

mentors.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
mentors.expertise: Orbital debris classification and planetary surface ML

mentors.name: Prof. Kenji Tanaka
mentors.expertise: Spectral analysis and remote sensing data fusion
